name: Blood Angels
notes: When creating an Adeptus Astartes Crucible Champion, you can make that character a Blood Angels character. Add the BLOOD ANGELS faction keyword after Step 1, then follow the remaining steps adding the Blood Angels options to those on the Adeptus Astartes pages.

options.name: Death Company
options.text: This model gains the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, and unless its unit is within 12" of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models, it cannot be selected to Fall Back and its Objective Control characteristic is 0. Add the DEATH COMPANY keyword and change the list of units this model can be attached to: Death Company Marines, Death Company Marines with Bolt Rifles.

options.name: Death Company with Jump Pack
options.text: Change this model's Move characteristic to 12", it gains the Deep Strike and Feel No Pain 6+ abilities, and unless its unit is within 12" of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models, it cannot be selected to Fall Back and its Objective Control characteristic is 0. Add the DEATH COMPANY, FLY and JUMP PACK keywords and change the list of units this model can be attached to: Death Company Marines with Jump Packs.

options.name: Hero of the Golden Host
options.text: Change this model's Move characteristic to 12" and it gains the Deep Strike ability. Add the FLY and JUMP PACK keywords and change the list of units this model can be attached to: Sanguinary Guard.

options.name: Venerable Death Company
options.text: This model gains the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, and unless it is within 12" of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models, it cannot be selected to Fall Back and its Objective Control characteristic is 0. Add the DEATH COMPANY keyword.

options.name: Venerable Librarian
options.text: Add the PSYKER keyword, and you can choose one additional ranged weapon for your model to be equipped with, which must be a Psychic weapon.

options.name: Blood Chalice
options.text: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

options.name: Forlorn Hero
options.text: While this model is leading a unit, unless that unit starts the battle embarked within a Transport, models in that unit have the Scouts 6" ability.
